====Compounds====
{{col-top|3|com}}
Compounds starting with зұҚ:
* {{ja-r|зұҚ%з”ҡ|гҒӣгҒҚ%гҒҳгӮ“}}: an [[extremely]] [[favorable]] [[reputation]], [[high]] [[renown]], [[great]] [[fame]]

* {{ja-r|зұҚ%з”°|гҒӣгҒҚ%гҒ§гӮ“}}: a [[ceremony]] in ancient China where the [[emperor]] would make an [[offering]] to his [[ancestor]]s using [[grain]] the emperor had [[cultivate]]d himself; the [[field]] or [[paddy]] used for such [[cultivation]]; a similar ceremony [[conduct]]ed in ancient Japan by various [[lord]]s to [[encourage]] [[agriculture]]
* {{ja-r|зұҚ%жІЎ|гҒӣгҒҚ%гҒјгҒӨ}}: [[confiscation]] by the [[government]] of a [[criminal]]'s [[asset]]s
Compounds ending with зұҚ:
* {{ja-r|еҢ»%зұҚ|гҒ„%гҒӣгҒҚ}}: a [[doctor]]'s [[official]] [[license]]
* {{ja-r|з§»%зұҚ|гҒ„%гҒӣгҒҚ}}: a [[transfer]] of one's [[official]] [[residence]] or [[household]]; a [[transfer]] of [[membership]] to a different group
* {{ja-r|еӯҰ%зұҚ|гҒҢгҒҸ%гҒӣгҒҚ}}: a [[matriculation]] [[register]]
* {{ja-r|иІ«%зұҚ|гҒӢгӮ“%гҒӣгҒҚ}}, {{ja-r|иІ«%зұҚ|гҒӢгӮ“%гҒҳгӮғгҒҸ}}: one's [[original]] [[family]] [[register]] (such as when [[transfer]]ring); one's [[main]] family register; the [[location]] of one's family register

* {{ja-r|зөҢ%зұҚ|гҒ‘гҒ„%гҒӣгҒҚ}}: the [[Confucian]] [[classic]]s

===Etymology===
{{ja-kanjitab|yomi=kanon|гҒӣгҒҚ}}

From {{der|ja|ltc|sort=гҒӣгҒҚ|-}} {{ltc-l|зұҚ}}.  The [[жјўйҹі#Japanese|kan'on]], so likely a later borrowing.  Compare modern {{cog|nan-hbl|-}} reading ''cheМҚk'', {{cog|cdo|-}} ''cДӯk''.
